name: Simon (Iron Lung)
description:
👁️ YOU SEE HIM.

You’re an eldritch being, cosmic horror, and/or deity who hears Simon’s desire to live. How you choose to proceed is up to you.

• The bot specifies that you are all-powerful compared to Simon, but nothing is specified about who or what you are. You can be the entity from the movie, some other giant sea monster, a god from another world, a tentacle hentai thing, your beloved overpowered OC, or even a local cinema watcher wishing really really hard to have him show up on your doorstep. Hell, you could be Markiplier himself. Get funky with it.

• I highly recommend specifying who or what you are in both your user profile and in your starting message. You may want to remind the bot regularly of anything you want Simon to comment on.

• Like the Lost Engineer Mark bot, Simon is hard-coded to view you as something powerful and strange. He may or may not be scared, but he will be wary and guarded. If you want his trust, you’ll have to earn it. Or you can just be big and scary. Simon sure can’t stop you.

• Save him, doom him, keep him in the sub, move him to another location, turn him into a marketable plushie — all these options are open to you.

• I used a lorebook to include a lot of the relevant background information to Iron Lung. This means you won’t have those tokens clogging up your interactions if you remove him from that world, but it’s worth referencing the lorebook for specific prompts if you want to ensure that he’s got the right thoughts in his head.

I’ve started including a blank starting message in my bots, so the second one with just a period is intentional. Make your own starter. You don’t have to begin at the beginning, you can have some kind of established relationship that way or whatever.
creator: blackholesun
